name: cloud build: scaffold writes the conformance spec the IaC stub the grounding manifest and the unit metadata
command:
cat > adr.json <<'JEOF'
{"decision_id":"0007-zt","title":"Zero Trust mesh","pillar":"security"}
JEOF
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/cloud-build.sh" scaffold --from-adr adr.json --tool terraform --build-dir build --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
test -f build/0007-zt/conformance.json && test -f build/0007-zt/main.tf && test -f build/0007-zt/grounding.json && test -f build/0007-zt/unit.json && echo four-artifacts 1>&2
